# SRC023 - TrustRadius 2025 B2B Tech Buying in the Age of AI

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | B2B SaaS Buying |
| Authors / source | TrustRadius |
| Year | 2025 |
| Source type | Vendor buyer survey |
| Quality | Medium |
| URL | [https://go.trustradius.com/rs/827-FOI-687/images/TrustRadius-2025-Buyer-Research-Report-Top-10-Takeaways.pdf](https://go.trustradius.com/rs/827-FOI-687/images/TrustRadius-2025-Buyer-Research-Report-Top-10-Takeaways.pdf) |

## Bias / limitation

Review-platform incentive; triangulate.

## Core takeaway

Buyers fact-check AI, value prior experience, and want transparent pricing.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use to make pricing transparency, review content, and fact-checkable pages default.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.
